archived_iter_summaries._prev_run_summary_iter_90: iter 90 — UNBLOCKED via root-cause fix in interactive session. Diagnosis: vote kernel `1 / (1 + distance)` was too flat — a self-match at d=0 got weight 1.0; six mismatched neighbours at d≈0.30 each got weight 0.77, summing to 4.6 and outvoting the exact match. This was the spec's choice (migration plan §'k-NN classifier' L280), not a deviation. Fix: change weighting to `1 / (epsilon + distance)` with epsilon=0.05 (semantic_router.py KERNEL_EPSILON). Self-match weight becomes 20.0, dominating any moderately-distant field. Eval-set accuracy 75% → 98% (3-run stability confirmed: 98/100 each). OOD eval 90% defer rate (still ≥80% gate). Multi-intent eval 96.7% (still ≥90% gate). 26 router-eval unit tests pass. Pre-existing failure in test_router_backfill::test_backfill_skips_duplicate_rows is unrelated to this change (reproduces with diff stashed).
